name: provenance entry with class pr-corpus must include a non-empty supporting_prs array
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[],"evidence_count":0,"organizations_count":0}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json --strict 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'supporting_prs.*empty' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
